text: the widget cache eviction interval was fixed at ninety seconds to bound memory use
the nightly export job caps its retries at three after a timeout
so we agreed three retries maximum on the nightly export then it errors out
always stamp the release tag before generating the notes or the version derives wrong
the staff login flow moved from passwords to hardware security keys
prefer snake case for configuration keys across every service
the mobile client needs a longer socket timeout than the desktop build
we chose ndjson over sqlite as the canonical store because git merges line records cleanly
the retry backoff was set to a flat two seconds between attempts
a false positive in the secret scrubber is unrecoverable so bias to under redaction
the dashboard refreshes every fifteen minutes to limit api load
the goal this quarter is to cut cold start latency in half
tried caching rendered templates in memory but abandoned it the invalidation was too fragile
the operator mentioned the brindle connector flakes on friday deploys
a passing note that the tarn queue drops messages above sixty kilobytes
the search index rebuilds atomically through a temp file and an os replace
gist the search index rebuild is atomic via a temporary file swap
run the linter locally before pushing workflow edits the remote check is slow
the audit digest is regenerated by a cron job not committed by hand
keep operator messages free of jargon use plain stage names not internal tokens
the staging environment mirrors production but with synthetic data
invoices are generated on the first business day of each month
the onboarding email sequence has four steps over ten days
the report generator paginates results at fifty rows per page
the feature flag service polls for changes on a thirty second interval
the api rate limit was set to one hundred requests per minute
deploys run manually on friday afternoons after the standup
gist several sessions set limits on retries and backoff between attempts
